title: Filing of final judgment
doc_html:
§12.  Filing of final judgment

As soon as a final judgment has been rendered, a certified copy of the judgment shall be filed in the office of the commissioner.

Acts 1989, No. 282, §4, eff. June 27, 1989.

{{NOTE:  SEE ACTS 1989, NO. 282, §5.}}
doc_text:
§12.  Filing of final judgment
As soon as a final judgment has been rendered, a certified copy of the judgment shall be filed in the office of the commissioner.
Acts 1989, No. 282, §4, eff. June 27, 1989.
{{NOTE:  SEE ACTS 1989, NO. 282, §5.}}
